title: MaceNerf
description: The plugin allows you to nerf your mace using percentages
body:
# 🪓 MaceNerf Simple. Lightweight. Effective. MaceNerf is a minimal Paper/Spigot plugin that reduces Mace damage by a configurable percentage, helping you rebalance PvP without removing the item entirely. Perfect for SMPs and competitive PvP servers. --- ## ⚙️ Features • Percentage-based Mace damage reduction • Fully editable config • Reload command support • Lightweight & optimized • Optional experimental exploit prevention --- ## 📌 Default Nerf By default, Mace damage is reduced by: **30%** You can change this value inside the configuration file. ---
📂 Configuration ```yaml # MaceNerf Configuration # Made By F1aled_ # Percentage of damage to remove from Mace attacks. # Default: 30.0 (30% less damage) mace-nerf-percentage: 30.0 # Prevent attribute swapping exploits (experimental) prevent-attribute-swapping: false ```
---
💻 Commands `/macenerf reload` Reloads the configuration without restarting the server.
---
🔐 Permissions `macenerf.admin` Required to use the reload command.
---
📦 Supported Versions • 1.21-1.21.10 • Paper • Spigot • Compatible forks
--- ## 🎯 Why Use MaceNerf? Instead of banning the mace entirely, MaceNerf gives you precise percentage-based control over its damage output while keeping gameplay balanced.
